description_long: This is a military-style SUV painted in matte olive drab green, featuring a boxy, utilitarian design with minimal decorative elements. The vehicle has four side doors and a large rear cargo area, with windows along the sides and rear. Prominent U.S. Army markings, including a white star and serial numbers, are visible on the doors and rear panels. The SUV is equipped with black steel wheels and rugged tires suitable for off-road or urban environments. The roof has a set of orange marker lights, and the front grille is simple and functional, lacking chrome or luxury features. The overall appearance suggests durability and functionality, with a focus on practicality over aesthetics.
description: A matte olive drab green military SUV with U.S. Army markings, black steel wheels, and a boxy, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, U.S. Army star, serial numbers, and two side doors with a large rear cargo window.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the double rear windows, tail lights, and the broad, flat cargo door.
description_view_2: Side view of the right profile, similar to the left, with visible doors, windows, and military markings.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the flat hood, black grille, headlights, and roof marker lights.
attribute_wheel_design: black steel wheels with a simple, solid design and no visible spokes
